title: ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Medical Officer Posts
description: Acharya NG Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Medical Officer Jobs. Those candidates who have completed their MBBS can use this opportunity and apply for the ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
